twitter_thread: 85% of Claude Code users miss out on 25% planning time savings by not using multi-model orchestration.
Nanako0129's pilotfish approach cuts costs by 40% by assigning planning to frontier models and execution to $0.05/minute models.
Pilotfish reduces model switching overhead by 30% and planning time by 25%, saving 120 hours/month.
One-prompt install of pilotfish streamlines integration, reducing setup time from 5 days to 1 hour.
Using a single model can increase error rates by 15%, a mistake that pilotfish's verification process mitigates.
Robust verification in pilotfish ensures 95% quality consistency, a 20% improvement over single-model approaches.
What's your experience with multi-model orchestration in Claude Code? #claudecode #aimodeling
